description: Group 13 (vacuum substance accounting) may import from Group 12: policy rules for scalar constraint, Box kappa, rho-kappa separation, GR coefficient insertion. Open proof obligations: scalar constraint propagation, P_scalar, P_recombination, E_vac_config definition, boundary mass preservation theorem. Candidate routes: kappa covariantized relaxation, reduced recombination map, kappa free-energy exchange. Branch decisions: all positive parent identity routes are deferred pending prerequisites. Group 13 must not reopen exclusions established in Group 12.
